name: Tarragon Mushroom and Shrimp Bites
recipeIngredient: 23 medium-sized fresh shrimp, peeled and deveined (1/2 lb)
24 slices of fresh mushroom (1/2-inch thick) (about 1 lb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients; stir well.
2. Combine half of the lemon juice mixture and shrimp in a 9-inch glass pieplate; toss well.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
4. Combine mushroom slices and remaining lemon juice mixture; toss well.
5. Cover and set aside.
6. Arrange shrimp in a single layer with the thickest portion toward the outside of the pieplate.
7. Cover with heavy-duty plastic wrap and vent.
8. Microwave at HIGH for 2 minutes to 2 minutes 20 seconds or until shrimp is done. Rearrange shrimp and rotate the pie plate halfway through cooking.
9. Drain shrimp and reserve marinade.
10. Add water and the next four ingredients to the reserved marinade, stirring with a whisk.
11. Add shrimp; toss well.
12. Thread one mushroom slice and one shrimp onto each of 24 wooden picks.
13. Yield: 24 appetizers (about 15 calories each).
